prompt: A {argument name="photography style" default="photorealistic portrait with shallow depth of field and soft bokeh"} of a {argument name="subject" default="young Japanese woman"} looking back over her shoulder at the camera with a {argument name="expression" default="gentle smile"}. She is wearing a {argument name="attire" default="light beige kimono with orange maple leaf patterns"} and a gold obi. Her dark hair is styled in an elegant updo with loose strands framing her face, and she wears small pearl earrings. The background features an {argument name="setting" default="autumn garden with vibrant red maple leaves"}, with bright red foliage framing the top left and a heavily blurred, soft background creating a serene, cinematic atmosphere.
translatedPrompt: 一张 {argument name="photography style" default="具有浅景深和柔和虚化效果的写实人像"}，主角是一位 {argument name="subject" default="年轻日本女性"}，正回头看向镜头，脸上带着 {argument name="expression" default="温柔的微笑"}。她身着 {argument name="attire" default="带有橙色枫叶图案的浅米色和服"}，腰间系着金色腰带。深色长发盘成优雅的发髻，几缕发丝垂在脸颊旁，耳边戴着精致的珍珠耳环。背景设定为 {argument name="setting" default="红叶绚烂的秋日庭院"}，左上角点缀着鲜艳的红叶，背景经过深度虚化处理，营造出宁静而富有电影感的氛围。

breakdown.creativeCore: 写实风格秋季和服人像：生成一张极具真实感的人像照片，背景为色彩鲜艳、带有丰富虚化效果的秋景，主角身着和服。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, cinematic]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: shallow depth, depth of field, camera]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
